entity.summary: Multichain concentrated-liquidity decentralized exchange developed within the Eliteness ecosystem, using protocol-agnostic liquidity, configurable tick spacing, and dynamic pool fees across supported EVM networks.
entity.notes: HEI models 2THICK and its chain-specific deployments as one exchange entity. The broader Eliteness directory contains other distinct exchange products, including E3 and THICK; those are not silently merged into this record.

evidence.title: Eliteness Network decentralized exchange directory
evidence.notes: Current first-party directory identifies 2THICK as the second iteration of the THICK DEX and describes tick-spacing pool selection and configurable dynamic fees.

evidence.title: 2THICK protocol trading metrics
evidence.notes: Independent metrics report current non-zero TVL, fees, and DEX volume across Sonic, Base, and Fantom, corroborating active exchange operation.
